text:
Hemotropic Butterfly (, Kōketsuchō) is a species of crimson-colored butterflies found on Zevil Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 25 

Appearance

Hemotropic Butterflies have a red body and bright red wings. The tips of their wings are a darker shade of red.

Behavior

Hemotropic Butterflies can detect the scent of blood from a good distance. The more blood there is, the more butterflies gather around the victim. However, like ordinary butterflies, they can also feed on nectars. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Attracted to the scent of Gon's blood, a few Hemotropic butterflies feed off the open sores on Gon's hands. This inspires Gon to use one to locate the wounded Hisoka. 

References
